lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ਪਹਿਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: raag sireeraag mahalaa pahilaa 1 ghar 1 |
lines.english: Raag Siree Raag, First Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਸਤੂਰਿ ਕੁੰਗੂ ਅਗਰਿ ਚੰਦਨਿ ਲੀਪਿ ਆਵੈ ਚਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kasatoor kungoo agar chandan leep aavai chaau |
lines.english: scented with musk, saffron and sandalwood, a sheer delight to behold

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਤੀ ਤ ਮੰਦਰ ਊਸਰਹਿ ਰਤਨੀ ਤ ਹੋਹਿ ਜੜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: motee ta mandar aoosareh ratanee ta hohi jarraau |
lines.english: If I had a palace made of pearls, inlaid with jewels,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਭੂਲਾ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਤੇਰਾ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਨਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mat dekh bhoolaa veesarai teraa chit na aavai naau |1|
lines.english: -seeing this, I might go astray and forget You, and Your Name would not enter into my mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਜੀਉ ਜਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har bin jeeo jal bal jaau |
lines.english: Without the Lord, my soul is scorched and burnt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਆਪਣਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਛਿ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਅਵਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਥਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mai aapanaa gur poochh dekhiaa avar naahee thaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I consulted my Guru, and now I see that there is no other place at all. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਤੀ ਤ ਹੀਰੇ ਲਾਲ ਜੜਤੀ ਪਲਘਿ ਲਾਲ ਜੜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dharatee ta heere laal jarratee palagh laal jarraau |
lines.english: If the floor of this palace was a mosaic of diamonds and rubies, and if my bed was encased with rubies,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਣੀ ਮੁਖਿ ਮਣੀ ਸੋਹੈ ਕਰੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਪਸਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mohanee mukh manee sohai kare rang pasaau |
lines.english: and if heavenly beauties, their faces adorned with emeralds, tried to entice me with sensual gestures of love

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਭੂਲਾ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਤੇਰਾ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਨਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mat dekh bhoolaa veesarai teraa chit na aavai naau |2|
lines.english: -seeing these, I might go astray and forget You, and Your Name would not enter into my mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਧੁ ਹੋਵਾ ਸਿਧਿ ਲਾਈ ਰਿਧਿ ਆਖਾ ਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: sidh hovaa sidh laaee ridh aakhaa aau |
lines.english: If I were to become a Siddha, and work miracles, summon wealth

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਭੂਲਾ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਤੇਰਾ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਨਾਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mat dekh bhoolaa veesarai teraa chit na aavai naau |3|
lines.english: -seeing these, I might go astray and forget You, and Your Name would not enter into my mind. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਪਤੁ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ਬੈਸਾ ਲੋਕੁ ਰਾਖੈ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gupat paragatt hoe baisaa lok raakhai bhaau |
lines.english: and become invisible and visible at will, so that people would hold me in awe

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਹਾਸਲੁ ਕਰੀ ਬੈਠਾ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਸਭ ਵਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hukam haasal karee baitthaa naanakaa sabh vaau |
lines.english: issuing commands and collecting taxes-O Nanak, all of this could pass away like a puff of wind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਲਤਾਨੁ ਹੋਵਾ ਮੇਲਿ ਲਸਕਰ ਤਖਤਿ ਰਾਖਾ ਪਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sulataan hovaa mel lasakar takhat raakhaa paau |
lines.english: If I were to become an emperor and raise a huge army, and sit on a throne,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਭੂਲਾ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਤੇਰਾ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਨਾਉ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: mat dekh bhoolaa veesarai teraa chit na aavai naau |4|1|
lines.english: Seeing these, I might go astray and forget You, and Your Name would not enter into my mind. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੰਦੁ ਸੂਰਜੁ ਦੁਇ ਗੁਫੈ ਨ ਦੇਖਾ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਸਉਣ ਨ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: chand sooraj due gufai na dekhaa supanai saun na thaau |
lines.english: and if I lived in a cave and never saw either the sun or the moon, and if I never slept, even in dreams

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਕੋਟੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਆਰਜਾ ਪਵਣੁ ਪੀਅਣੁ ਅਪਿਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott kottee meree aarajaa pavan peean apiaau |
lines.english: If I could live for millions and millions of years, and if the air was my food and drink,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਆਖਣੁ ਆਖਣਾ ਜੇ ਭਾਵੈ ਕਰੇ ਤਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sun sun aakhan aakhanaa je bhaavai kare tamaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have heard, over and over again, and so I tell the tale; as it pleases You, Lord, please instill within me the yearning for You. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੀ ਤੇਰੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਹਉ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਆਖਾ ਨਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhee teree keemat naa pavai hau kevadd aakhaa naau |1|
lines.english: -even so, I could not estimate Your Value. How can I describe the Greatness of Your Name? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਨਿਜ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa nirankaar nij thaae |
lines.english: The True Lord, the Formless One, is Himself in His Own Place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੀ ਸੇਤੀ ਜਾਲੀਆ ਭਸਮ ਸੇਤੀ ਰਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: agee setee jaaleea bhasam setee ral jaau |
lines.english: burnt by fire and mixed with ashes

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਸਾ ਕਟੀਆ ਵਾਰ ਵਾਰ ਪੀਸਣਿ ਪੀਸਾ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kusaa katteea vaar vaar peesan peesaa paae |
lines.english: If I was slashed and cut into pieces, over and over again, and put into the mill and ground into flour,

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੀ ਤੇਰੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਹਉ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਆਖਾ ਨਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhee teree keemat naa pavai hau kevadd aakhaa naau |2|
lines.english: -even then, I could not estimate Your Value. How can I describe the Greatness of Your Name? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਖੀ ਹੋਇ ਕੈ ਜੇ ਭਵਾ ਸੈ ਅਸਮਾਨੀ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pankhee hoe kai je bhavaa sai asamaanee jaau |
lines.english: If I was a bird, soaring and flying through hundreds of heavens,

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੀ ਤੇਰੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਹਉ ਕੇਵਡੁ ਆਖਾ ਨਾਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bhee teree keemat naa pavai hau kevadd aakhaa naau |3|
lines.english: -even so, I could not estimate Your Value. How can I describe the Greatness of Your Name? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰੀ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਆਵਊ ਨਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਪੀਆ ਨ ਖਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nadaree kisai na aavaoo naa kichh peea na khaau |
lines.english: and if I was invisible, neither eating nor drinking anything
